RESPONSE TO DEFT'S DEMURRER OF DEFTS TO COMPLAINT; POS; DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF CORDON, MARIO

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS SALMA FAMILY LIMITED PARTNERSHIP, AND, LAITH SALMA DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND, NO REASONABLE PROBABILITY THAT DEFECT CAN BE CURED BY AMENDMENT. UNLICENSED CONTRACTORS ARE PROHIBITED FROM BRINGING OR MAINTAINING AN ACTION TO RECOVER COMPENSATION. B & P CODE SECTION 7031. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE CSR #5797
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUN-08-2010 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: HEARING CONTINUED TO JUNE 8, 2010. DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-08-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS SALMA FAMILY LIMITED PARTNERSHIP, and, LAITH SALMA DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Appearances: Philip S. Keith, Esq. Attorney at Law, (415) 433-1790 appearing for Defendant and Moving party. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer is sustained without leave to amend, no reasonable probability that defect can be cured by amendment. Unlicensed contractors are prohibited from bringing or maintaining an action to recover compensation. B & P Code section 7031. Order signed in open Court. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-27-2010 Continued To Jun-08-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS SALMA FAMILY LIMITED PARTNERSHIP, LAITH SALMA DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Hearing continued to June 8, 2010. Both parties to provide courtesy copies of their papers with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
